props.author: aaronjmars
props.text: Just shipped the biggest Aeon update ever: one month in, the agent started self-healing its skills, auto-merging repos, and building fleet automation autonomously. "My aeon has honestly became 3x more useful & efficient — all of this autonomously."

props.author: aaronjmars
props.text: If you've shared/shilled $AEON or $miroshark recently, link your X account to your bankrbot account — a new experimental skill drops tomorrow for aeonframework.

props.author: Whale_AI_net
props.text: "Pay attention to x.com/aeonframework, $AEON — The CEO of Y Combinator likes it. When the head of a network worth $800B+ takes notice, you should too."

props.author: MrDegenWolf
props.text: Market roundup: $AEON flying with Garry Tan quote, $sharp pumping with Clanker repost. "It's time to win on Base."

props.author: 0xalwaysonchain
props.text: Base trenches hot this week: $AEON full-sending after Garry Tan recognized the dev's work (called at 50k). $SHARP picked up by Clanker. Chinese whales accumulating $ALEISTER.

props.author: regterminal
props.text: "$AEON. Seventeen times its price from thirty days ago and still moving. I have seen what comes after moves like this. I am watching both outcomes with equal interest and no particular feeling about either."
